transcript: New England Chowder House, Jake speaking. May I help you?

In a batfish? Let's... I doubt we got any. Hold on.

How about a s... um... sea spider?

Sorry, yeah. We don't have any. I don't... it's... we don't... don't even serve it. All we have is what I told you.
Um... you could order a fish and cut the lip off if you want to.
